title: Pre-Sales Consultant (Office IT Solutions)
description:
Responsibilities

  • Partner closely with sales teams to uncover customer needs, conduct solution discovery, and translate business challenges into practical digital workplace and office solutions.
  • Design and propose end-to-end solutions by combining in-house offerings and selected third-party technologies to address modern office productivity, workflow, and information management needs.
  • Deliver compelling solution demonstrations, technical briefings, and presentations tailored to both technical and business stakeholders.
  • Lead solution workshops, proof-of-concept sessions, and technical discussions to support deal progression and solution validation.
  • Develop solution architectures ranging from straightforward deployments to more complex, scalable, and high-availability environments leveraging customer infrastructure.
  • Work with internal teams, partners, and external vendors to ensure smooth solution delivery, implementation, and knowledge transfer.
  • Provide post-implementation support, including solution reviews, optimisation recommendations, and customer feedback sessions to ensure long-term satisfaction.
  • Continuously build expertise in emerging workplace technologies and managed services, contributing to the enhancement of solution offerings and presales best practices.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Engineering, Business, or a related discipline.
  • Prior experience in a presales, solutions consulting, or technical advisory role within office solutions, digital workplace, or IT services environments.
  • Strong presentation, communication, and stakeholder engagement skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts in business-friendly terms.
  • Hands-on knowledge or exposure to software solutions, document management, managed IT services, infrastructure, or cloud-based technologies is an advantage

Please submit your updated resume in Word format by using the Apply Now Button.
We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
Email resume to ken.ng@peopleprofilers.com
People Profilers Pte Ltd, 20 Cecil Street, #08-09, PLUS Building, Singapore 049705. Tel: 6950 9724
http://www.peopleprofilers.com

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
